Import ServiceTitan Data

Paste CSV export from ServiceTitan. Technicians are auto-matched to the board by name.

ServiceTitan Jobs Report columns (export exactly these):
Job #, Job Type, Business Unit, Job Campaign, Primary Technician, Sold By, Jobs Total, Sales from Leads Created, Status, Completion Date, Estimates, Jobs Estimate Sales Subtotal, Opportunity, Warranty, Recall, Lead Created, Lead Created By

In ServiceTitan → Reports → Jobs Report → select columns above → Export to CSV → paste below.
Filter by: Status = Completed and your desired date range.

Team Photos & Names

Click any photo area to upload an image. Edit display names directly — changes are saved automatically to your browser.
